message:
chore(beads): mark CLUSTER RESET parity task in progress (frankenredis-hahy)

Assign frankenredis-hahy (redis parity: CLUSTER RESET HARD and SOFT
semantics) to codex-frankenredis and flip its status from open to
in_progress so the ready queue no longer surfaces it as unclaimed work
while that agent is actively implementing the command.

No source code changes here — pure issue-tracker bookkeeping.
